feed.title: TechCrunch｜企業テックブログRSS
feed.subtitle: TechCrunchセクションのブログ更新をまとめたRSSフィード

entry.title: Sam Altman’s biometric startup World raises $52.5 million via crypto sale | TechCrunch
entry.summary: Sam Altman's side project — which seeks to scan the world's eyeballs and turn them into unique digital identifiers — has raised some fresh cash through a crypto sale.
entry.content: Sam Altman's side project — which seeks to scan the world's eyeballs and turn them into unique digital identifiers — has raised some fresh cash through a crypto sale.

entry.title: As US weighs response to Chinese AI, industry urges against broad open-weight restrictions | TechCrunch
entry.summary: AI companies, including Nvidia and Mistral, urge policymakers to avoid broad restrictions on open-weight AI models as Washington debates responses to Chinese AI and alleged model distillation.
entry.content: AI companies, including Nvidia and Mistral, urge policymakers to avoid broad restrictions on open-weight AI models as Washington debates responses to Chinese AI and alleged model distillation.

entry.title: Rivian sues the US government for ‘full refund’ of Trump tariffs | TechCrunch
entry.summary: The automaker joins a long line of companies seeking such refunds. In April, Rivian CFO Claire McDonough said she expected the company stood to reap a refund in the "tens of millions of dollars."
entry.content: The automaker joins a long line of companies seeking such refunds. In April, Rivian CFO Claire McDonough said she expected the company stood to reap a refund in the "tens of millions of dollars."

entry.title: Bluesky’s AI assistant Attie expands into an open social research tool | TechCrunch
entry.summary: Users can now ask Attie questions about news, trends, and conversations on Bluesky and other apps on the AT Protocol.
entry.content: Users can now ask Attie questions about news, trends, and conversations on Bluesky and other apps on the AT Protocol.

entry.title: Midjourney acquired the astrology app Co-Star | TechCrunch
entry.summary: The AI lab Midjourney continues to expand its purview beyond image and video generation.
entry.content: The AI lab Midjourney continues to expand its purview beyond image and video generation.

entry.title: OpenAI’s new voice mode makes it to the ChatGPT desktop app | TechCrunch
entry.summary: ChatGPT Voice on desktop can work with both ChatGPT Work and Codex to complete tasks and control agents.
entry.content: ChatGPT Voice on desktop can work with both ChatGPT Work and Codex to complete tasks and control agents.

entry.title: Facebook launches a dedicated Marketplace app for sellers, adds a free verification system | TechCrunch
entry.summary: Seller is a dedicated Marketplace app for people who list and sell items frequently.
entry.content: Seller is a dedicated Marketplace app for people who list and sell items frequently.

entry.title: How AI guardrails are impeding the work of offensive cybersecurity researchers | TechCrunch
entry.summary: We spoke with several cybersecurity researchers, who look for unknown vulnerabilities and develop tools to exploit them, about how OpenAI’s and Anthropic’s guardrails affect their work.
entry.content: We spoke with several cybersecurity researchers, who look for unknown vulnerabilities and develop tools to exploit them, about how OpenAI’s and Anthropic’s guardrails affect their work.

entry.title: Meet the judges who will crown Australia’s next breakout startup | TechCrunch
entry.summary: TechCrunch Startup Battlefield is coming to Australia — and we're partnering with Stripe to find the country's most exciting early-stage startups.
entry.content: TechCrunch Startup Battlefield is coming to Australia — and we're partnering with Stripe to find the country's most exciting early-stage startups.

entry.title: Mobileye CEO Amnon Shashua to step aside as company pushes into robotaxis, robotics | TechCrunch
entry.summary: Shashua has been invited to take the chairman of the board seat.
entry.content: Shashua has been invited to take the chairman of the board seat.

entry.title: AMD takes on Nvidia with its Helios AI rack-scale system | TechCrunch
entry.summary: AMD is challenging its chipmaker rival with a new rack-scale system that will start shipping to customers later this year.
entry.content: AMD is challenging its chipmaker rival with a new rack-scale system that will start shipping to customers later this year.

entry.title: Patreon lays off 20% of its workforce | TechCrunch
entry.summary: In a memo to staff that was posted online, Conte said the company's core business is strong, but the platform has to respond to market changes and adjust its cost structure to remain stable.
entry.content: In a memo to staff that was posted online, Conte said the company's core business is strong, but the platform has to respond to market changes and adjust its cost structure to remain stable.

entry.title: Insurance startup Corgi reportedly raised more money at $4B — its third round in 8 weeks | TechCrunch
entry.summary: In the AI-funding frenzy, many startups are raising back-to-back rounds at ever-increasing valuations — but even by those standards, Corgi stands out.
entry.content: In the AI-funding frenzy, many startups are raising back-to-back rounds at ever-increasing valuations — but even by those standards, Corgi stands out.

entry.title: Tesla’s door handles may spur new US safety rules | TechCrunch
entry.summary: The new rule-making process follows a series of incidents, including fatal ones, in which people have become stuck inside cars.
entry.content: The new rule-making process follows a series of incidents, including fatal ones, in which people have become stuck inside cars.

entry.title: Meta drops out of a major clean energy pact as its natural gas buildout accelerates | TechCrunch
entry.summary: Meta has made significant investments in natural gas over the past year. Now it's dropping out of an industry renewable energy group.
entry.content: Meta has made significant investments in natural gas over the past year. Now it's dropping out of an industry renewable energy group.

entry.title: Anthropic updates Claude voice mode with more capable models | TechCrunch
entry.summary: Claude's new voice model will let you reschedule your meeting or draft an email.
entry.content: Claude's new voice model will let you reschedule your meeting or draft an email.

entry.title: AegisAI, founded by former Google security execs, lands $36M to stop AI-driven spear phishing | TechCrunch
entry.summary: AegisAI co-founders developed AI agents that quickly analyze each message as a human would, paying attention to small anomalies that even the most elaborate checklist wouldn’t catch.
entry.content: AegisAI co-founders developed AI agents that quickly analyze each message as a human would, paying attention to small anomalies that even the most elaborate checklist wouldn’t catch.

entry.title: US government says Iran-linked hackers are disrupting American water and energy providers | TechCrunch
entry.summary: An updated government advisory warns that Iranian hackers are exploiting systems used by water and energy providers.
entry.content: An updated government advisory warns that Iranian hackers are exploiting systems used by water and energy providers.

entry.title: Runway launches AI model router as generative media gets crowded | TechCrunch
entry.summary: The Media Router is a tool that automatically selects the best image, video, or audio generation model for a request based on whether a developer prioritizes quality, speed or cost.
entry.content: The Media Router is a tool that automatically selects the best image, video, or audio generation model for a request based on whether a developer prioritizes quality, speed or cost.

entry.title: OpenAI makes ChatGPT Health available to all US users | TechCrunch
entry.summary: Users can also integrate their personal data from services like Apple Health, Function, and MyFitnessPal.
entry.content: Users can also integrate their personal data from services like Apple Health, Function, and MyFitnessPal.
